name: King Ranch Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter a 9 x 12-inch dish and make a bed of 12 corn tortillas, dipped in chicken broth.
2. Layer the following ingredients in order listed (boned chicken, onion, bell pepper, cheese, and chili powder).
3. Spoon cream of mushroom soup and cream of chicken soup over the layers.
4. Mix stewed tomatoes and Ro-Tel tomatoes with chilies and pour over top.
5. Bake for 30 minutes at 350 degrees.
Note: For less spicy, use a whole can of stewed tomatoes, omitting Ro-Tel tomatoes. For more spicy, omit stewed tomatoes and add 1 can of Ro-Tel tomatoes.
